profile.markdown:
**Alias:** Son of Flames

**Species:** Human  
**Gender:** Male  
**Born:** Fire Throat, Agelta Drylands

"Heir of Fire Throat, fire mage."

story.markdown: In his hometown of Agelta, he showed an amazing talent for arcane energy manipulation when he first arrived at the Magic Academy, so he was valued by his mentor Gord. But Gord got very angry when he discovered that he had incorporated the spells of his hometown into the arcane, thinking that he had defiled the arcane. After a battle between the master and the disciple, Valir left the Magic Academy.

content.markdown:
In the southwest of the Land of Dawn lies an active volcano that brought deadly peril to all who dared approach. "Inferno of Fire", was what people called this place. It was also known as the place of trial for Mages eager to master flame spells. After leaving the magic academy, Valir dwelled himself there for five years while carrying a ten-year promise with Vale. He hoped that day would come more quickly, but at the same time, he also hoped that day would never come. One day, Valir cast his arcane flame magic towards the volcano but the result was not to his expectation.

In the western desert, there was a man who was looking for Valir. The betrayal of years was something he could never forgive. With great anger and hate, and to maintain the reputation of the magic academy, he decided to track down the traitor. The moment he felt an unusual arcane power releasing from the volcano, he smiled.

The long-term inhabitance in this "Inferno of Fire" brought changes to Valir's body. His skin was burned by the flames of the volcano, but in order to become the Son of Flames, he had to combine the power of his arcane flame magic with the volcano's inferno fire. His body and his will must withstand the trials of these scalding lava. Suddenly, a strong wind blew, bringing a familiar sense to Valir. Vale had come! They had never met each other since childhood. This encounter led to the first fight between them, between fire and wind. The Windtalker and the Son of Flames cast their all magic to attack each other. No words were exchanged, but they shared a common thought - they didn't want to kill each other. However, their fight generated great power, which was aggravated the volcano. If the volcano burst, they would surely die in an inferno.

Five years left - can't you wait Vale!?

Before Vale said anything, Valir heard another familiar voice, it was Gord. Gord's presence interrupted this fight between these brothers. He wanted to abolish the arcane magic of Valir, because in his mind, his pure arcane wisdom should never be tarnished. However, the arcane spell he cast to Valir was stopped by Vale. Vale turned to sympathy upon looking at Valir's tortured body. He didn't want anyone to hurt his brother. However, Valir didn't need such sympathy.

One of them was his master who wanted to destroy his apprentice for his apparent betrayal. Another one of them had been his closest brother. However, he was also the son of the one who killed Valir's father. The sacred flame would never be quenched. Valir successfully combined the power of his arcane flame magic with the inferno fire and burst out a powerful energy. With this power, the lava became unstable. Meanwhile, Valir gained a mighty body while his eyes became scarlet flames. At that time, Vale could understand his father's worries. This kind of power astonished Gord, and as his teacher, he would rather kill his student than to let him be possessed by this crazy power.

Valir's flame, Vale's wind, and Gord's arcane power aggravated the volcano, which led to a great collapse. After that, Vale and Gord tried to find Valir, but they couldn't find him. Vale knew that in his heart Valir was still alive, and that their ten-year promise was not yet broken. The five-years made Valir formidable, what was to happen after another five years? Vale knew the next time they encountered each other, it would no longer be as friends and brothers. Rather, it would be about the greatest fight for their lives.

details.markdown: Valir's skills apply a stack of Ablaze to enemies hit, dealing them Magic Damage equal to 0.6% of their Max HP per second for 4 seconds. At 3 stacks, the fire detonates, dealing Magic Damage equal to 6% of the target's Max HP to the enemy and stunning them for 1 second. The same target can only be stunned by Valir's skills once every 7 seconds.

Valir launches a fireball that explodes upon hitting the first target, dealing base Magic Damage and slowing them by 30% for 1 second. The lingering flame on the ground will explode after 1 second, dealing additional Magic Damage.

Valir recharges 1 fireball every 9 seconds and can hold up to 2 fireball charges. Hitting an enemy hero or Legend Creep with this skill will immediately restore a fireball charge, while hitting a Minion will restore 50% of the recharge time.

- Base Damage: 235 / 270 / 305 / 340 / 375 / 410  
- Explosion Damage: 118 / 135 / 153 / 170 / 188 / 205  
- Mana Cost: 50 / 58 / 66 / 74 / 82 / 90

Valir unleashes a torrent of flames in the target direction, dealing base Magic Damage to enemies hit and knocking them to the end of its path.

Vengeance Flame: The torrent forms a fire wall at the end of its path that lasts 4 seconds and deals Magic Damage per second to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by the torrent or the firewall are slowed by 25% for 1 second.

- Base Damage: 200 / 220 / 240 / 260 / 280 / 300  
- Firewall Damage per second: 80 / 88 / 96 / 104 / 112 / 120  
- Cooldown: 13 / 12.4 / 11.8 / 11.2 / 10.6 / 10.0 seconds  
- Mana Cost: 80 / 86 / 92 / 98 / 104 / 110  
- Spell Vamp Ratio: 50%

Valir removes all debuffs on himself and conjures 4 Vengeance Flames that last 9 seconds. Each of his subsequent skills consumes 1 Vengeance Flame to deal 30% extra base damage. The effects of both Burst Fireball and Searing Torrent can be enhanced. Meanwhile, Valir gains 40% extra Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds.

- Damage Increase: 30% / 35% / 40%  
- Cooldown: 36 / 33 / 30 seconds  
- Mana Cost: 100 / 125 / 150

trivia.markdown: The name "Valir" means "Valley" in Bengali language.

Valir's original skills were very different from his current version, focusing more on fire explosions than CC and sustain. His burn damage can kill enemies even after he stops attacking if they are still ablaze.
Valir is the only Mage who has a skill that can knock back multiple enemies at once.
Demonlord and Infernal Blaze's shared the ultimate quote.
Valir's collector skin Demonlord, is in the same timeline to Vale's Collector Skin "Supernal Tempest".
Valir's skin Shikigami Summoner looks like Seimei, the founder of Scarlet Shadow.

markdown:
# Profile

**Alias:** Son of Flames

**Species:** Human  
**Gender:** Male  
**Born:** Fire Throat, Agelta Drylands

"Heir of Fire Throat, fire mage."

# Story

In his hometown of Agelta, he showed an amazing talent for arcane energy manipulation when he first arrived at the Magic Academy, so he was valued by his mentor Gord. But Gord got very angry when he discovered that he had incorporated the spells of his hometown into the arcane, thinking that he had defiled the arcane. After a battle between the master and the disciple, Valir left the Magic Academy.

# Side Story

## Inferno of Fire

In the southwest of the Land of Dawn lies an active volcano that brought deadly peril to all who dared approach. "Inferno of Fire", was what people called this place. It was also known as the place of trial for Mages eager to master flame spells. After leaving the magic academy, Valir dwelled himself there for five years while carrying a ten-year promise with Vale. He hoped that day would come more quickly, but at the same time, he also hoped that day would never come. One day, Valir cast his arcane flame magic towards the volcano but the result was not to his expectation.

In the western desert, there was a man who was looking for Valir. The betrayal of years was something he could never forgive. With great anger and hate, and to maintain the reputation of the magic academy, he decided to track down the traitor. The moment he felt an unusual arcane power releasing from the volcano, he smiled.

The long-term inhabitance in this "Inferno of Fire" brought changes to Valir's body. His skin was burned by the flames of the volcano, but in order to become the Son of Flames, he had to combine the power of his arcane flame magic with the volcano's inferno fire. His body and his will must withstand the trials of these scalding lava. Suddenly, a strong wind blew, bringing a familiar sense to Valir. Vale had come! They had never met each other since childhood. This encounter led to the first fight between them, between fire and wind. The Windtalker and the Son of Flames cast their all magic to attack each other. No words were exchanged, but they shared a common thought - they didn't want to kill each other. However, their fight generated great power, which was aggravated the volcano. If the volcano burst, they would surely die in an inferno.

Five years left - can't you wait Vale!?

## Master and Brothers

Before Vale said anything, Valir heard another familiar voice, it was Gord. Gord's presence interrupted this fight between these brothers. He wanted to abolish the arcane magic of Valir, because in his mind, his pure arcane wisdom should never be tarnished. However, the arcane spell he cast to Valir was stopped by Vale. Vale turned to sympathy upon looking at Valir's tortured body. He didn't want anyone to hurt his brother. However, Valir didn't need such sympathy.

One of them was his master who wanted to destroy his apprentice for his apparent betrayal. Another one of them had been his closest brother. However, he was also the son of the one who killed Valir's father. The sacred flame would never be quenched. Valir successfully combined the power of his arcane flame magic with the inferno fire and burst out a powerful energy. With this power, the lava became unstable. Meanwhile, Valir gained a mighty body while his eyes became scarlet flames. At that time, Vale could understand his father's worries. This kind of power astonished Gord, and as his teacher, he would rather kill his student than to let him be possessed by this crazy power.

Valir's flame, Vale's wind, and Gord's arcane power aggravated the volcano, which led to a great collapse. After that, Vale and Gord tried to find Valir, but they couldn't find him. Vale knew that in his heart Valir was still alive, and that their ten-year promise was not yet broken. The five-years made Valir formidable, what was to happen after another five years? Vale knew the next time they encountered each other, it would no longer be as friends and brothers. Rather, it would be about the greatest fight for their lives.

# Abilities

## Ashing

Valir's skills apply a stack of Ablaze to enemies hit, dealing them Magic Damage equal to 0.6% of their Max HP per second for 4 seconds. At 3 stacks, the fire detonates, dealing Magic Damage equal to 6% of the target's Max HP to the enemy and stunning them for 1 second. The same target can only be stunned by Valir's skills once every 7 seconds.

## Burst Fireball

Valir launches a fireball that explodes upon hitting the first target, dealing base Magic Damage and slowing them by 30% for 1 second. The lingering flame on the ground will explode after 1 second, dealing additional Magic Damage.

Valir recharges 1 fireball every 9 seconds and can hold up to 2 fireball charges. Hitting an enemy hero or Legend Creep with this skill will immediately restore a fireball charge, while hitting a Minion will restore 50% of the recharge time.

- Base Damage: 235 / 270 / 305 / 340 / 375 / 410  
- Explosion Damage: 118 / 135 / 153 / 170 / 188 / 205  
- Mana Cost: 50 / 58 / 66 / 74 / 82 / 90

## Searing Torrent

Valir unleashes a torrent of flames in the target direction, dealing base Magic Damage to enemies hit and knocking them to the end of its path.

Vengeance Flame: The torrent forms a fire wall at the end of its path that lasts 4 seconds and deals Magic Damage per second to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by the torrent or the firewall are slowed by 25% for 1 second.

- Base Damage: 200 / 220 / 240 / 260 / 280 / 300  
- Firewall Damage per second: 80 / 88 / 96 / 104 / 112 / 120  
- Cooldown: 13 / 12.4 / 11.8 / 11.2 / 10.6 / 10.0 seconds  
- Mana Cost: 80 / 86 / 92 / 98 / 104 / 110  
- Spell Vamp Ratio: 50%

## Vengeance Flame

Valir removes all debuffs on himself and conjures 4 Vengeance Flames that last 9 seconds. Each of his subsequent skills consumes 1 Vengeance Flame to deal 30% extra base damage. The effects of both Burst Fireball and Searing Torrent can be enhanced. Meanwhile, Valir gains 40% extra Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds.

- Damage Increase: 30% / 35% / 40%  
- Cooldown: 36 / 33 / 30 seconds  
- Mana Cost: 100 / 125 / 150

# Trivia

- The name "Valir" means "Valley" in Bengali language.
- Valir's original skills were very different from his current version, focusing more on fire explosions than CC and sustain. His burn damage can kill enemies even after he stops attacking if they are still ablaze.
- Valir is the only Mage who has a skill that can knock back multiple enemies at once.
- Demonlord and Infernal Blaze's shared the ultimate quote.
- Valir's collector skin Demonlord, is in the same timeline to Vale's Collector Skin "Supernal Tempest".
- Valir's skin Shikigami Summoner looks like Seimei, the founder of Scarlet Shadow.

metadata.hook: The five years in the Inferno of Fire forged Valir into the Son of Flames, but the next time he meets his brother in wind, it will be a fight for their lives.
metadata.teaser: Forged in a living volcano and hunted by his own master, Valir walks a blazing path where brotherhood, betrayal, and a ten-year promise collide.
metadata.openingLine: In the southwest of the Land of Dawn lies an active volcano that brought deadly peril to all who dared approach.
